testcase.name: StynxAuditController API contract > keeps audit log access guarded and permission-bound
StynxAuditController API contract > delegates audit log queries to the audit service
StynxAuditModule.forRoot > wires default options and provider classes
StynxAuditModule.forRoot > starts and clears the daily detach scheduler only when all dependencies are configured
StynxAuditService.listLog > queries audit.log with no filters and clamps limit to [1, 200]
StynxAuditService.listLog > returns nextCursor when there is a tail row beyond the limit
StynxAuditService.listLog > omits nextCursor when no tail row
StynxAuditService.listLog > maps Date occurred_at values to ISO strings
StynxAuditService.listLog > applies all filters and the cursor when set
StynxAuditService.listLog > throws when Database provider is unavailable
StynxAuditService.dryRunDetachEligible > skips partitions whose name does not match log_YYYY_MM
StynxAuditService.detachEligible > returns [] when there are no eligible plans
StynxAuditService.detachEligible > throws when partitions exist but no bucket/dumpRunner/archive are configured
StynxAuditService.detachEligible > dumps, uploads, detaches, and drops eligible partitions
StynxAuditService.detachEligible > uses the default archive key prefix when module options omit keyPrefix
StynxAuditService.runDailyDetachJob > runs detach but logs nothing when nothing detached
StynxAuditService.runDailyDetachJob > logs when the daily detach job detaches partitions
StynxAuditService.verifyChain > clamps limit to [1, 10000]
StynxAuditService.verifyChain > returns valid=true with totalChecked=0 when no rows
StynxAuditService.verifyChain > rejects a chain whose first row has a non-null previous_hash
StynxAuditService.verifyChain > rejects a chain whose previous_hash points at the wrong predecessor
StynxAuditService.verifyChain > accepts a valid two-event chain
StynxAuditService.verifyChain > accepts chain rows with nullable audit payload fields and hashes empty defaults
@stynx/audit barrel > exports at least one symbol
StynxAuditService hash-chain verification > accepts sequential audit rows and rejects tampered payloads
planAuditDetach > detaches standard partitions after 90 days
planAuditDetach > retains lgpd-tagged partitions hot for five years
planAuditDetach > rejects malformed partition months and detaches expired lgpd partitions
AuditSqlSink > mode: audit_write_function > calls SELECT audit.write with the 13 expected params
AuditSqlSink > mode: audit_write_function > synthesizes pk from entityId when pk not provided
AuditSqlSink > mode: audit_write_function > passes pk through when provided explicitly
AuditSqlSink > mode: audit_write_function > uses correlationId when requestId is absent
AuditSqlSink > mode: audit_write_function > sends nulls for absent fields
AuditSqlSink > mode: audit_event_table > INSERTs into the default audit_event table with the expected 8 params
AuditSqlSink > mode: audit_event_table > honors custom schema + table options
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > queries audit.log with no filters when query is empty
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > applies tenantId / entity / operation / actorId / requestId / from / to filters
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > maps row shape into AuditSqlListItem (audit_log mode)
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > passes through string occurredAt unchanged
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > sanitizes invalid limit/offset (negative, NaN, oversize) to safe defaults
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > honors custom schema + table options
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > accepts array-shaped executor results (no .rows wrapper)
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > treats non-array rows wrappers as empty results
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: audit_log > maps audit log rows with missing optional fields to public defaults
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: stynx_events > queries stynx_events with full filter set
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: stynx_events > maps row shape into AuditSqlListItem with metadata + previousHash + rowHash
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: stynx_events > uses defaults for missing operation/entity/tenancy fields
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: porm_logged_actions > queries porm logged_actions with entity/operation/requestId/from/to filters
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: porm_logged_actions > maps PORM rows into AuditSqlListItem shape
AuditSqlReader.list > mode: porm_logged_actions > maps PORM rows with missing optional fields to public defaults
audit test helpers > returns all rows when no tag subset is requested
audit test helpers > filters rows by tag subset and reports missing audit rows
